Petition For Removal Of Trustee And Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Aug-13-2019 Continued To Oct-15-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Winnie Loh for and with Peter Chronis and Elena Chronis. Daphne Lin for Nadine Chronis Shea (Trustee).

The Court stated that before it today is Pettion For Removal Of Trustee and Appointment of Successor Trustee. The Court then inquired as to how the litgation will proceed and if the parties had talked. Ms. Loh stated that they filed a reply to the objections, that it was filed on Friday, and that the attached exhibits did not get filed until yesterday. Ms. Lin stated that there may be a possibility to solve this matter informally, that she didn't get a chance to talk to other side due to her vacation, and that her client is agreeable to mediation. Ms. Loh stated that the estate is pretty straightforward that it consisted of three real properties, two investment accounts, and $104,000.00. Ms. Ms. Loh also stated that at this point all that they've seen distributed so far is the property.

The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than October 4, 2019. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by October 8, 2019. The matter was continued to and the Parties are to return on October 15, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. The Court stated that if the matter doesn't resolve that it wants the parties to meet & confer, that it wants the parties to file a joint status statement, that it wants to know what steps will be necessary to get this matter to a resolution.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Matter not reported.
